Itemized  ·  Procedures  ·  CT abdomen and pelvis with contrast  ·  California

CT abdomen and pelvis with contrast cost in California.

Cash-pay range for ct abdomen and pelvis with contrast across 48 hospitals in California: $56 to $11,382. CPT code 74177. Pulled from each hospital's federally-mandated price transparency file.

Cheapest in California
$56
Adventist Health Glendale
Glendale, CA
vs.
Most expensive in California
$11,382
Torrance Memorial Medical Center
Torrance, CA
